description: Product Description Bright Bots Potty Training Pants Inexpensive, sustainable, washable, quick drying, hard wearing, stylish and comfortable! MINIMISE LITTLE ACCIDENTS Comfortable ‘pull-on’ training pants designed to minimise little accidents and assist in toilet training. WATER RESISTANT Made with a comfy and absorbent 100% cotton terry layer and a PUL lined gusset. ENCOURAGE INDEPENDENCE Developed to assist your toddler in toilet training and designed to look and feel just like the underpants that “bigger kids” wear. Our trainer pants encourage your child to progress through potty training. BRIGHT COLOURS Available in 14 colours: Purple, Yellow, Green, Pink, Orange, Red, Blue, Mid Blue, Pale Blue, Pale Green, Turquoise, Pale Pink, Mauve and Print. POTTY TRAINING PANTS SIZEING GUIDE Help your little one make the change! Bright Bots ‘pull-on’ training pants are designed to minimise little accidents and are made with an absorbent 100% cotton terry and have a PUL gusset in cotton mix terry. They are comfortable with softly elasticated legs. These training pants will be of assistance in potty training but are not designed for multiple “accidents”. Toddlers should be changed each time pants gets wet. These reusable training pants are an inexpensive and sustainable alternative to disposables as they are washable and hard wearing. Benefits of Potty Training Pants Inexpensive Sustainable Machine Washable Hard Wearing Comfortable Stylish and bright!
